pageTitle: Wayne Rutter | Dudley Golf Club Digital Museum
summary: Wayne Rutter has played 4 recorded competitions in the Digital Museum. Wayne Rutter has recorded 3 wins, with 1 runner-up finish and 4 top-three finishes. Wayne Rutter's strongest competition so far is Club Championship. Current Hall of Fame status: Strong Candidate with a score of 115.

curator.biography: Wayne Rutter has competed in 4 recorded competitions. The player has won 3 competitions. 1 runner-up finish has also been recorded. 4 top-three finishs demonstrates consistent performance. Current Hall of Fame status: Emerging Candidate.
curator.hallOfFameCitation: Wayne Rutter currently holds a Hall of Fame score of 51 and is classified as Emerging Candidate.
